cases.SQL: explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t1 where a = (select a from t2 limit 1)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where a = (select a from t2 limit 1)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t1 where exists(select 1 from t2 where a = 1)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where exists(select 1 from t2 where a = 1)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t1 where not exists(select 1 from t2 where a = 1)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where not exists(select 1 from t2 where a = 1)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t1 where exists(select 1 from t2 where a = (select a from t3 limit 1) and b = a);
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where exists(select 1 from t2 where a = (select a from t3 limit 1) and b = a);
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t1 where (a, b) = (select a, b from t2 limit 1)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where (a, b) = (select a, b from t2 limit 1)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select *,(select a from t2 limit 1) from t1 where a = (select a from t2 limit 1)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select a, (select max(b) from t2 where t2.a ) as max_b, (select count(*) from t3 where t3.a) as count_t3 from t1
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where a = (select a from t2 where b = (select b from t3 where c = (select c from t4 where a = 1)))

explain analyze format = 'brief' with cte1 as (select a, b from t1 where c > (select avg(c) from t2)), cte2 as (select a, b from t2 where a in (select a from t3 where b > 20)) select cte1.*, cte2.* from cte1 join cte2 on cte1.a = cte2.a
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where a > (select count(*) from t2) and b < (select max(b) from t3) and c = (select avg(c) from t4)
explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where a + (select max(a) from t2) > (select avg(b) from t3)

explain analyze format = 'brief' select * from t1 where a > (select a from t2 where b = (select b from t3 where c = (select c from t4 where aa = 255))) and b < (select bb from t2 where cc = (select dd from t3 where ee = (select ff from t4 where gg = 32767)))
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where a in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not a in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not not not a in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not (not (a in (select a from t2)))
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not a in (select a from t2) and a is not null
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a, count(*) from t1 group by a having not not a in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not a in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not not a in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not a in (select a from t2) or a = -1
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not ((a in (select a from t2)) = 1)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not (a not in (select a from t2))
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where a not in (select a from t2)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not t1.a in (select t2.a from t2 where t2.b = t1.b)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not exists (select 1 from t2 where t2.a = t1.a)
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where not not ((not a) in (select a from t2))
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t1 where (not a) in (select a from t2)
